sentences.arabic: تَحْكِي الجَدَّةُ قِصَصًا لِلأَطْفَالِ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother tells stories to the children at night.

sentences.translation: Djeca sjede oko nje i slušaju.
sentences.translationEn: The children sit around her and listen.
The stories contain useful lessons for life.
The children fall asleep peacefully after the story.
